description: The main issue is that our current implementation of the finite matrix Galerkin approach does not include a rigorously computed upper bound for the truncation error. Furthermore, the explicit constants from MOW are not carried through into our propagation of estimates. Finally, property tau is stated without constructive constants for the spectral gap. Resolving all would require a full numerical certification of (a) the decay of tail matrix norms and (b) extraction of explicit constants from MOW's proof trace.
action_taken: The main issue is that our current implementation of the finite matrix Galerkin approach does not include a rigorously computed upper bound for the truncation error. Furthermore, the explicit constants from MOW are not carried through into our propagation of estimates. Finally, property tau is stated without constructive constants for the spectral gap. Resolving all would require a full numerical certification of (a) the decay of tail matrix norms and (b) extraction of explicit constants from MOW's proof trace.
